result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts in mRemoteNG conflict with national keyboard mappings, causing usability issues for users with non-US keyboard layouts.
result.approach: Investigate how keyboard input is processed, specifically how System.Windows.Forms.Keys values are generated in different national keyboard layouts. Implement a mechanism to correctly interpret key presses or allow for user-configurable key bindings to resolve conflicts.
